arg.name: robot_model
arg.description: Robot model to view. Choices are: [allie, cornelius, joe].

arg.name: prefix
arg.description: Joint name prefix, useful for multi-robot setups.

arg.name: use_mock_hardware
arg.description: Whether to unfold the mock ros2_control configuration.

arg.name: rviz
arg.description: Launch RViz alongside the robot model.

let.name: selected_urdf_file
let.value: $(eval '\'allie.urdf.xacro\' if \'$(var robot_model)\' == \'allie\' else \'cornelius.urdf.xacro\' if \'$(var robot_model)\' == \'cornelius\' else \'joe.urdf.xacro\'')

let.name: selected_rviz_file
let.value: $(eval '\'allie.rviz\' if \'$(var robot_model)\' == \'allie\' else \'cornelius.rviz\' if \'$(var robot_model)\' == \'cornelius\' else \'joe.rviz\'')

let.name: robot_description_content
let.value: $(command '$(find-exec xacro) $(find-pkg-share cororos2_description)/urdf/$(var selected_urdf_file) prefix:=$(var prefix) use_mock_hardware:=$(var use_mock_hardware) mock_sensor_commands:=$(var effective_mock_sensor_commands)')
